product_overview: Franja Pixelada is an API-first e-commerce backend for tactical/military apparel in Colombia, providing product catalog, cart/checkout, loyalty, returns and JWT authentication with integrations for Stripe and Nequi (manual bank transfer). The API is designed for SPA/mobile clients and includes pagination, rate limiting and cookie-based refresh tokens.
core_goals: Provide a secure JWT-based authentication system with refresh tokens delivered as HttpOnly cookies for session continuity.
Expose a complete product catalog API with filtering, search, verified reviews and favorites.
Support a persistent shopping cart and reliable checkout flow including Nequi manual payments and Stripe card payments.
Enable a loyalty points system to earn and redeem points on orders and preview redemptions.
Offer a returns eligibility and request API aligned with configurable policy windows and documentation.
Maintain health and operability endpoints for infrastructure liveness checks and automated monitoring.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Register users, login, manage JWT access (in response body) and refresh tokens (HttpOnly cookie), logout, and retrieve the current user profile. Login CAPTCHA and throttle behaviors differ between test and production.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/register/ with {email, first_name, last_name, password, password2} (password >=8 and not common) -> Receive 201 with access token in response body and refresh_token set as HttpOnly cookie
POST /api/v1/auth/login/ with {email, password} (DISABLE_CAPTCHA=True in test env) -> Receive 200 with access token and refresh_token cookie set
GET /api/v1/auth/me/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with authenticated user object
POST /api/v1/auth/token/refresh/ with refresh_token cookie present (sent automatically by client session) -> Receive 200 with new access token
POST /api/v1/auth/logout/ with refresh_token cookie present -> Receive 200 with detail and refresh_token cookie cleared
POST /api/v1/auth/register/ with missing password2 or password mismatch -> Receive 400 validation error (password2 required / mismatch)
POST /api/v1/auth/login/ with incorrect credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials
POST /api/v1/auth/login/ without captcha_token/captcha when DISABLE_CAPTCHA=False -> Receive 400 Captcha error
POST /api/v1/auth/login/ repeatedly exceeding throttle -> Receive 429 Rate limited

features.name: Product Catalog API
features.description: Browse, filter and view product details, view featured/new-arrivals lists, submit verified reviews, and manage favorites.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/products/ with optional query params (search, category, is_featured, is_new) -> Receive 200 with paginated products (20/page)
GET /api/v1/products/{slug}/ -> Receive 200 with product object
GET /api/v1/products/featured/ -> Receive 200 with plain JSON array of featured products (no pagination wrapper)
GET /api/v1/products/new_arrivals/ -> Receive 200 with plain JSON array of new arrival products
GET /api/v1/products/categories/ -> Receive 200 with Category[]
GET /api/v1/products/eligible-reviews/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with list [{order_id, order_number, product_id, product_name, product_slug}]

POST /api/v1/products/{slug}/reviews/create/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {order_id, rating, comment, images[]} where order_id is from eligible-reviews and order was delivered -> Receive 201 with created Review object
POST /api/v1/products/favoritos/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {product_id} -> Receive 200 {favorited: boolean}
GET /api/v1/products/favoritos/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Favorito[]
GET /api/v1/products/{slug}/ for non-existent slug -> Receive 404 Not found
POST /api/v1/products/{slug}/reviews/create/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> but order not delivered or product not in order -> Receive 403 Order not delivered or product not in order
POST /api/v1/products/{slug}/reviews/create/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> submitting a second review for same (user, product) -> Receive 400 Validation error (duplicate review)

features.name: Shopping Cart API
features.description: Manage a persistent user cart: add items (with product customization fields), view cart contents and compute totals with optional coupons.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/products/ -> Receive 200 paginated list; take data['results'][0]['id'] as product_id

POST /api/v1/orders/cart/add_item/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {product_id: <uuid from products results>, quantity: 2, variant: <optional uuid>, talla: 'M', bordado: 'text', rh: 'O+'} -> Receive 201 with full Cart object (items[], subtotal, total_items)
GET /api/v1/orders/cart/my_cart/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with current Cart and items
GET /api/v1/orders/cart/calculate_totals/?coupon=CODE with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with {subtotal, tax, shipping, discount, total}
POST /api/v1/orders/cart/add_item/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid product_id (random/unknown UUID) -> Receive 404 Product not found
POST /api/v1/orders/cart/add_item/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and invalid quantity (0 or exceeding stock) -> Receive 400 Out of stock or invalid quantity
GET /api/v1/orders/cart/my_cart/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Checkout and Orders API
features.description: Create orders (Nequi manual payment via multipart upload), list user orders and validate coupons. Payments include Stripe (active) and Nequi manual proof upload; PayPal is a known stub.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/orders/checkout/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and multipart body {shipping_full_name, shipping_phone, shipping_department, shipping_city, shipping_address_line1, email, payment_proof: file} -> Receive 201 with Order object
GET /api/v1/orders/orders/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with paginated Order[]
POST /api/v1/orders/coupons/validate/ with body {code, subtotal} -> Receive 200 with coupon discount details
POST /api/v1/orders/checkout/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
POST /api/v1/orders/checkout/ with missing required multipart fields (e.g., no payment_proof for Nequi flow) -> Receive 400 Validation error
POST /api/v1/orders/coupons/validate/ with invalid code -> Receive 400 Invalid coupon
Note: Attempting PayPal-based flows will hit a stub in the codebase (PayPal endpoint returns 501) — clients should use Stripe or Nequi instead

features.name: Loyalty Points API
features.description: Allow users to view points balance, see transaction history and preview point redemptions without persisting changes.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/loyalty/balance/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 {points_balance, balance_in_cop, point_value_cop, points_per_cop}
GET /api/v1/loyalty/transactions/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 paginated PointTransaction[]
POST /api/v1/loyalty/preview/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body {points_to_use: 500, order_total: 120000} -> Receive 200 {discount_amount, points_used, remaining_points}
POST /api/v1/loyalty/preview/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and points_to_use greater than available -> Receive 400 Validation error

features.name: Returns API
features.description: Expose the platform's return policy, check order eligibility for returns and list user return requests with policy-driven rules and windows.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/returns/policy/ -> Receive 200 with {window_days_new, window_days_used, shipment_window_days, excluded_category_slugs, digital_exclusion_enabled, special_sku_prefixes, steps, document}
GET /api/v1/returns/eligibility/{order_id}/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 {eligible: boolean, reason: string}
GET /api/v1/returns/ with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 paginated ReturnRequest[]
GET /api/v1/returns/eligibility/{order_id}/ for an order outside the return window -> Receive 200 {eligible: false, reason: '<explanation>'}
GET /api/v1/returns/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Liveness probe used by orchestration (Kubernetes/monitoring) returning service status and UTC timestamp.
user_flows: GET /health/ -> Receive 200 with {status: 'ok', service: 'franja_pixelada', timestamp: '<ISO8601 UTC>'}
GET /health/ when a dependent service (e.g., database) is down -> Receive 500 (service unhealthy) or equivalent non-200 status for monitoring alerts

tech_stack.auth: JWT (SimpleJWT) - 60min access / 7day refresh (HttpOnly cookie named refresh_token)

tech_stack.payments: Stripe (active), PayPal (stub 501), Neki manual bank transfer

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User registration, login, JWT token management, logout. CAPTCHA on login is disabled when DISABLE_CAPTCHA=True (set in test environment). Login throttle is relaxed when TESTING=True (200/min instead of 5/min).

endpoints.description: Register a new user. Requires password2 field (password confirmation). Returns access token in body; refresh token as HttpOnly cookie. IMPORTANT — password must be complex (min 8 chars, NOT a common password like 'password123', 'test1234', etc). Use passwords like 'TestP@ss9182!' or 'Xq7!mZ2#vL'.

body.password: string (required, min 8 chars, must NOT be a common password — Django CommonPasswordValidator enforced)

response_schema.201: {user: {email, first_name, last_name, phone, account_type, profile_image}, access: string}
response_schema.400: Validation error: missing fields, password mismatch, duplicate email, or common/weak password

endpoints.description: Authenticate user. When DISABLE_CAPTCHA=True (test env), captcha_token and captcha fields are NOT required. Returns access token in body; refresh token as HttpOnly cookie.

response_schema.401: Invalid credentials (wrong email or password) — SimpleJWT returns 401, NOT 400, for bad credentials
response_schema.429: Rate limited (5/min in prod, 200/min when TESTING=True)

endpoints.description: Refresh access token. Reads refresh_token from HttpOnly cookie automatically.

response_schema.401: No active session — Spanish error: {"detail": "No hay sesión activa."} — assert 'no hay' in detail.lower() or 'sesi' in detail.lower()

endpoints.description: Logout user and clear refresh_token cookie.
Get current authenticated user profile.

features.name: Product Catalog API
features.description: Product listing, detail, filtering, search, reviews, favorites

endpoints.description: List products with pagination (20/page). Public endpoint.
Get product detail by slug
Get featured products. Returns a plain JSON array (NOT paginated — no count/results wrapper).

response_schema.200: Product[] — plain array, e.g. [{id, sku, name, slug, ...}, ...]

endpoints.description: Get new arrival products. Returns a plain JSON array (NOT paginated).
Create a verified-purchase review. User must have a DELIVERED order containing this product. Requires order_id from that order. Only one review per (user, product) pair.

body.order_id: uuid (required — must be a delivered order containing this product)

response_schema.400: Validation error, order_id missing, or duplicate review
response_schema.403: Order not delivered or product not in order

endpoints.description: Returns list of products the authenticated user can review (delivered orders, not yet reviewed). Use order_id from here for the create review endpoint.
List all product categories
List user favorites
Toggle product favorite
Get current user cart

Add item to cart. IMPORTANT: (1) Use field name 'product_id' (the endpoint also accepts legacy alias 'product'). (2) product_id must be a REAL UUID fetched from GET /api/v1/products/ first — never hardcode or generate random UUIDs. (3) Always fetch products list, take results[0]['id'] as product_id.

body.product_id: uuid (required — fetch real id from GET /api/v1/products/ then use data['results'][0]['id'])

response_schema.201: Full Cart object (NOT a CartItem) — schema: {id, items: [{id, product, product_name, product_price, variant, talla, bordado, rh, quantity, price_at_addition, line_total}], total_items, subtotal, updated_at}
response_schema.400: Out of stock or invalid quantity

endpoints.description: Calculate totals with optional coupon
Create order via Neki manual payment (multipart)
List user orders
Validate coupon code
Get loyalty points balance
Paginated loyalty transaction history
Preview redemption without persisting
Get full return policy config and document (public). IMPORTANT: returns a config object, NOT {policy: string}. Assert response keys include 'window_days_new', 'steps', 'document'.

response_schema.200: {window_days_new: int, window_days_used: int, shipment_window_days: int, excluded_category_slugs: array, digital_exclusion_enabled: bool, special_sku_prefixes: array, steps: array, document: object}

endpoints.description: Check if order is eligible for return
List user return requests
Liveness probe. Returns JSON with status, service name, and UTC timestamp.

known_limitations.issue: Refresh token in HttpOnly cookie only — test clients must handle cookies (use requests.Session)
known_limitations.impact: Token refresh requires cookie support; pass session cookies between requests

known_limitations.issue: Registration requires password2 field (not standard DRF)
known_limitations.impact: Always include password2 matching password in register requests

known_limitations.issue: CAPTCHA on login disabled when DISABLE_CAPTCHA=True in environment
known_limitations.impact: In test env, skip captcha_token and captcha fields; in prod they are required

known_limitations.issue: Login throttle is 200/min when TESTING=True, 5/min in production
known_limitations.impact: Use unique emails per test run to avoid duplicate user errors (e.g. user_<timestamp>@test.com)
